features: Decision Lens module (modules/analysis_decision_lens.R): a QSEM-inspired interpretation layer reachable via Analysis Tools -> Decision Lens, in all 9 languages.

Factor classification (impact-vs-control axis): surfaces the previously dormant MICMAC analysis (calculate_micmac_safe) as an influence-vs-dependence quadrant scatter, dual-encoded by colour + shape for accessibility, plus a sortable table. Reading is structural (polarity/strength discarded).

System-archetype detection (functions/decision_lens.R::detect_archetypes): Tragedy of the Commons (a shared State/stock drawn on by >=2 distinct Activities -> govern the shared resource, Ostrom) and Limits to Growth (the GB->D reinforcing engine checked by a Response-mediated balancing loop -> leverage the Response). Fixes-that-Fail and Shifting-the-Burden intentionally deferred (not separable without delay/temporal data; weak marine support).

Deterministic, fully internationalised 'why this matters' narrative fusing a node's quadrant role x loop participation x archetype leverage. Template + i18n, never ML-generated (works on torch-less deployments).

Scientifically validated: archetype motifs and leverage advice checked against marine-SES / system-dynamics literature via the scientific-validation skill (Hallett & Hobbs 2020; Frischmann et al. 2019; Battersby/Ostrom 2017); valid-loop topology verified against is_valid_dapsirwrm_transition (cycles close via GB->D or R->{D,A,P,S}).
